lead: This machine uses cz, suru, and reset. Set the current suru count before using the suru line.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep cz, suru, and reset on separate lines.

sections.title: How to use
body: Use cz when the current table should be read as cz.
Use suru only after the current count is fixed.

sections.title: Memo
body: If the count is unclear, do not force the suru line.
This article follows the current checker structure.
